name: Sam's Bar & Gaming (+Golf)
about: Sam's Bar & Gaming is a family-run establishment offering indoor golf alongside bar and gaming amenities. The facility provides golf simulators for year-round play, allowing patrons to avoid weather-related disruptions. It caters to both individual practice sessions and group outings, with a focus on creating a welcoming environment for sports enthusiasts. Pricing is structured by time of day and day of the week, offering an accessible option for casual players looking for a combined golf and social experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Combines golfing with social and dining options

food_and_drink.notes: On-site kitchen available with a full menu
Full bar available with daily specials

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you are encouraged to bring your own clubs. If you do, please ensure the club faces are clean before play. The venue also has rentals available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted inside the simulators. However, there is a full kitchen and bar available on-site. All food and drinks must be kept at the provided tables.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It takes one person roughly one hour to golf 18 holes. A group of four would need four hours to complete their round.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Sam's Bar & Gaming is a family-run establishment with a welcoming atmosphere. Guests under 18 are required to be supervised by an adult when playing.
